.exit
// Quitter
// Doit afficher: 100.0 ETH
console.log("Solde:", ethers.formatEther(balance), "ETH");
const balance = await ethers.provider.getBalance(accounts[0].address);
// Doit afficher: 0x645B51da62B69F23A260D897E9aAAD56E10aeC7C
console.log("Compte Hardhat:", accounts[0].address);
const accounts = await ethers.getSigners();
exit
console.log("Solde Hardhat:", ethers.formatEther(balance), "ETH");
const balance = await ethers.provider.getBalance(accounts[0].address);
console.log("Solde Hardhat:", ethers.formatEther(balance), "ETH");
const balance = await ethers.provider.getBalance(accounts[0].address);
console.log("Solde Hardhat:", ethers.formatEther(balance), "ETH");
const balance = await ethers.provider.getBalance(accounts[0].address);
console.log("Compte Hardhat:", accounts[0].address);
const accounts = await ethers.getSigners();
